/usr/sbin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AuroraMC_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libAuroraMC.so -o libAuroraMC.so CMakeFiles/AuroraMC_shared.dir/MCStreamer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraMC_shared.dir/AsmPrinter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraMC_shared.dir/X86AsmPrinter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraMC_shared.dir/X86InstEncoder.cpp.o  ../CodeGen/libAuroraCodeGen.a ../Target/X86/libAuroraX86.a ../Target/libAuroraTarget.a ../Air/libAuroraAir.a ../ADT/libAuroraADT.a
